title: Final Golden Globes Predictions 2026: Best Picture - Drama & All Top Categories
text: According to Variety's Awards Circuit predictions, Hamnet is predicted to win Best Picture (Drama) at the 2026 Golden Globes. The drama category features six nominees, with the publication noting that the drama categories remain prestigious, even if more settled. The competing films are: Frankenstein (Netflix), Hamnet (Focus Features) — predicted winner, It Was Just an Accident (Neon), The Secret Agent (Neon), Sentimental Value (Neon), and Sinners (Warner Bros.). The article highlights that Sinners leads the dramatic field alongside Hamnet and Sentimental Value as close contenders. Additionally, Sentimental Value features Stellan Skarsgård as a surefire contender in the supporting actor category, suggesting strong overall recognition for that film. The predictions reflect current standings and are subject to change based on buzz and voting patterns throughout awards season.
